differential_diagnoses: Connective tissue disease-associated interstitial lung disease with pulmonary hypertension
next_steps: Immediate evaluation for double lung transplantation
Discontinue or cautiously reduce pulmonary vasodilators due to risk of pulmonary edema
Genetic testing for EIF2AK4 mutations (associated with PVOD/PCH)
Surgical lung biopsy or transbronchial lung cryobiopsy (if clinical status permits)
Invasive hemodynamic monitoring in the ICU with careful fluid balance management
Assess for occult autoimmune diseases including Sjogren's or occult systemic sclerosis
Evaluation for bridge to transplant with extracorporeal membrane oxygenation (ECMO) if hemodynamic instability progresses
